title: Optimizing Compiler Pipeline
scenario: Design a prompt to generate a Python function that implements a just-in-time (JIT) compiler pipeline for optimizing object code. The pipeline should have three stages: parsing, optimization, and code generation. The output should include the complete Python function body, with each stage implemented as a separate method. The prompt should be under 150 words and use present tense.
constraints: Must use type hints for function parameters and return types
Must include comments to explain each method's purpose

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the constraints.
Check if the pipeline stages are correctly implemented.
